about: About this itemWhy ThinkBook – Commercial Power with Style: Engineered with the same rugged DNA as the iconic Thinkbook, the ThinkBook delivers professional-grade performance in a sleek, modern design — perfect for business users, creators, and anyone who works smart and travels light.Built Tough, Designed to Perform Anywhere: ThinkBook 16 is tested on 12 MIL-STD-810H methods and 22 procedures to handle rough daily use. The aluminium top cover with anodized sandblasting finish adds a premium look while protecting against accidental knocks, drops, and spills — built for business, classrooms, or field work.High-Performance AMD Ryzen 7 Processor: Powered by the AMD Ryzen 7 7735HS with 8 cores, 16MB L3 Cache, 3.2GHz base clock and up to 4.75 GHz boost, this laptop effortlessly handles multitasking, business applications, software tools, and virtual meetings — ideal for working professionals, students, and creators.Fast Memory & Storage – Upgrade Ready: Comes with 16GB DDR5-4800 MHz RAM (dual-channel capable, upgradable up to 64GB) for smooth app switching and multitasking. Perfect for long working hours, content creation, spreadsheets, or streaming in all lighting conditions.›See more product details
